'''New Nystao''' was the capital city on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] for the [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] after their world, [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]], was devastated. It was named after their capital city of [[Nystao]]. [[Clan Hakh'khar]] was one of the Noghri families living there, and [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] maintained a [[Unidentified safe house (Wayland)|safe house]] in the city. Many members of all species could be found there investigating the ruins of [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]], and as such it had a thriving hotel and cafe business.

In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], [[Elan]] and [[Vergere]] were brought there following their "defection" from the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. In the ensuing Yuuzhan Vong attack on Wayland, New Nystao was [[Raid on Wayland (25 ABY)|devastated]]. Despite the virtual destruction of Wayland, casualties among the Noghri were few.<ref name="db">{{DB|location|wayland|Wayland}}</ref>
